visual_description: Two men in formal attire stand behind a seated person, with one man in a white shirt and tie looking down while the other in a dark suit places a hand on his chest. The seated person’s head is visible from behind, facing a table with an object on it. The background shows wooden doors and a green wall, with the men’s gazes directed toward the seated person or the table.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and a neutral tone, speaking at a moderate pace. There are no noticeable non-speech sounds or inflections.
